diagnostics.message: total `groupshared` allocation is 65536 bytes (> 16384-byte threshold) -- LDS pressure caps CU/SM occupancy at one thread group, eliminating wave-level latency hiding
`[numthreads(7, 7, 1)]` total 49 is not a multiple of 32 -- the final wave of every group launches with masked-off lanes that still consume a full wave slot

groupshared read of `SmallTile[[gi]]` is not separated by `GroupMemoryBarrier*` from a prior write to the same array on this CFG path; cross-lane reads are unordered without a barrier and produce undefined values once the workgroup spans more than one wave
groupshared read after a cross-thread write with no GroupMemoryBarrier* between them -- the reader may observe stale or partially-updated values; UB per the HLSL memory model
`[numthreads(4, 4, 1)]` total 16 is below the minimum wave size of 32 -- every wave slot launches with > 50% of lanes permanently masked off and no occupancy headroom for latency hiding

groupshared read of `SmallTile[[gi]]` is not separated by `GroupMemoryBarrier*` from a prior write to the same array on this CFG path; cross-lane reads are unordered without a barrier and produce undefined values once the workgroup spans more than one wave
groupshared read after a cross-thread write with no GroupMemoryBarrier* between them -- the reader may observe stale or partially-updated values; UB per the HLSL memory model
